recursive.hirText:
Superinterface_Trans: (Superinterface k c) <-
      (Superinterface k b),
      (DirectSuperinterface c b)

Superinterface_Inherit: (Superinterface k c) <-
      (Superinterface k b),
      (DirectSuperclass c b)

base.hirText:
MethodImplemented: (MethodImplemented simplename descriptor mtype meth) <-
      (Method_SimpleName meth simplename),
      (Method_Descriptor meth descriptor),
      (Method_DeclaringType meth mtype),
      (NOT (Method_Modifier 2161502 meth))

MainMethodDecl_Base: (MainMethodDeclaration meth) <-
      (MainClass mtype),
      (Method_DeclaringType meth mtype),
      (Method_SimpleName meth _c0),
      (FILTER return _c0 == 2979023;),
      (Method_Descriptor meth _c1),
      (FILTER return _c1 == 3018506;),
      (Method_Modifier _c2 meth),
      (FILTER return _c2 == 976234;),
      (Method_Modifier _c3 meth),
      (FILTER return _c3 == 909718;),
      (FILTER return meth != 590319 && meth != 1138805 && meth != 926489;)

recursive.hirText:
Subclass_Trans: (Subclass c a) <-
      (Subclass b a),
      (DirectSubclass b c)

base.hirText:
SubtypeOf_Class_Iface: (SubtypeOf s t) <-
      (isClassType_IDB s),
      (Superinterface t s)

SubtypeOf_Iface_Iface: (SubtypeOf s t) <-
      (isInterfaceType_IDB s),
      (Superinterface t s)

recursive.hirText:
SubtypeOf_Array: (SubtypeOf s t) <-
      (SubtypeOf sc tc),
      (ComponentType s sc),
      (ComponentType t tc),
      (isReferenceType sc),
      (isReferenceType tc)

base.hirText:
SubtypeOfDiff_Base: (SubtypeOfDifferent s t) <-
      (SubtypeOf s t),
      (FILTER return s != t;)

MethodLookup_Base: (MethodLookup simplename descriptor mtype meth) <-
      (MethodImplemented simplename descriptor mtype meth)

recursive.hirText:
MethodLookup_Super: (MethodLookup simplename descriptor mtype meth) <-
      (DirectSuperclass mtype supertype),
      (MethodLookup simplename descriptor supertype meth),
      (NOT (MethodImplemented simplename descriptor mtype _gen1))

MethodLookup_Iface: (MethodLookup simplename descriptor mtype meth) <-
      (DirectSuperinterface mtype supertype),
      (MethodLookup simplename descriptor supertype meth),
      (NOT (MethodImplemented simplename descriptor mtype _gen2))

base.hirText:
ClassInitializer: (ClassInitializer mtype meth) <-
      (MethodImplemented _c4 _c5 mtype meth),
      (FILTER return _c4 == 894110 && _c5 == 3016219;)

Precompute0: (CastTo frm to inmeth heap) <-
      (AssignCast casttype frm to inmeth),
      (SupertypeOf casttype heaptype),
      (HeapAllocation_Type heap heaptype),
      (FILTER return heaptype != 434817;)

Precompute0_String: (CastTo frm to inmeth heap) <-
      (AssignCast casttype frm to inmeth),
      (IsCastableToString casttype),
      (IsStringHeap heap)

Precompute1: (HeapHelper simplename descriptor toMeth thisP heap) <-
      (MethodLookup simplename descriptor heaptype toMeth),
      (HeapAllocation_Type heap heaptype),
      (ThisVar toMeth thisP)

Precompute1b: (HeapHelperNoThis simplename descriptor toMeth heap) <-
      (MethodLookup simplename descriptor heaptype toMeth),
      (HeapAllocation_Type heap heaptype)

Precompute2: (VirtualMethodInvocation invocation base simplename descriptor) <-
      (VirtualMethodInvocation_Base invocation base),
      (VirtualMethodInvocation_SimpleName invocation simplename),
      (VirtualMethodInvocation_Descriptor invocation descriptor)

HeapAllocHelper: (HeapAllocSuperType heap baseheap) <-
      (HeapAllocation_Type heap heaptype),
      (HeapAllocation_Type baseheap baseheaptype),
      (ComponentType baseheaptype comptype),
      (SupertypeOf comptype heaptype),
      (FILTER return baseheaptype != 522484;)

ArrayTypeCompatPrecompute: (ArrayTypeCompat baseheap vtype) <-
      (HeapAllocation_Type baseheap baseheaptype),
      (ComponentType baseheaptype basecomptype),
      (SupertypeOf vtype basecomptype)

recursive.hirText:
InitClass_Super: (InitializedClass superclass) <-
      (InitializedClass classD),
      (DirectSuperclass classD superclass)

InitClass_Iface: (InitializedClass superiface) <-
      (InitializedClass classOrIface),
      (DirectSuperinterface classOrIface superiface)

InitClass_Heap: (InitializedClass classD) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (AssignHeapAllocation heap _gen3 inmeth),
      (HeapAllocation_Type heap classD)

InitClass_StaticInvoke: (InitializedClass classD) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (Instruction_Method invocation inmeth),
      (MethodInvocation_Method invocation sig),
      (Method_DeclaringType sig classD),
      (isStaticMethodInvocation_Insn invocation)

InitClass_StoreStatic: (InitializedClass classOrIface) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreStaticField _gen4 sig inmeth),
      (Field_DeclaringType sig classOrIface)

InitClass_LoadStatic: (InitializedClass classOrIface) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadStaticField sig _gen5 inmeth),
      (Field_DeclaringType sig classOrIface)

Reachable_Clinit: (Reachable clinit) <-
      (InitializedClass classD),
      (ClassInitializer classD clinit)

Static_MultiHead: (Reachable tometh) (CallGraphEdge invocation tometh) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StaticMethodInvocation invocation tometh inmeth)

Assign_Param: (Assign actual formal) <-
      (CallGraphEdge invocation meth),
      (FormalParam idx meth formal),
      (ActualParam idx invocation actual)

Assign_Return: (Assign ret local) <-
      (CallGraphEdge invocation meth),
      (ReturnVar ret meth),
      (AssignReturnValue invocation local)

VPT_HeapAlloc: (VarPointsTo heap vr) <-
      (AssignHeapAllocation heap vr inMeth),
      (Reachable inMeth)

VPT_Assign: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Assign frm to),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

VPT_Assign: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Assign frm to),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

VPT_Local: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (AssignLocal frm to inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

VPT_Local: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (AssignLocal frm to inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

VPT_Cast: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (CastTo frm to inmeth heap),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

VPT_Cast: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (CastTo frm to inmeth heap),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

ReachableLoadInstanceField_rule: (ReachableLoadInstanceField base sig to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadInstanceField base sig to inmeth)

VPT_LoadField: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (ReachableLoadInstanceField base sig to),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (InstanceFieldPointsTo heap sig baseheap)

VPT_LoadField: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (ReachableLoadInstanceField base sig to),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (InstanceFieldPointsTo heap sig baseheap)

VPT_LoadField: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (ReachableLoadInstanceField base sig to),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (InstanceFieldPointsTo heap sig baseheap)

VPT_LoadStatic: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadStaticField fld to inmeth),
      (StaticFieldPointsTo heap fld)

VPT_LoadStatic: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadStaticField fld to inmeth),
      (StaticFieldPointsTo heap fld)

VPT_LoadArray: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadArrayIndex base to inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap),
      (Var_Type to vtype),
      (ArrayTypeCompat baseheap vtype)

VPT_LoadArray: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadArrayIndex base to inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap),
      (Var_Type to vtype),
      (ArrayTypeCompat baseheap vtype)

VPT_LoadArray: (VarPointsTo heap to) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (LoadArrayIndex base to inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap),
      (Var_Type to vtype),
      (ArrayTypeCompat baseheap vtype)

ReachableInstructionHelper: (ReachableInstruction invocation) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (Instruction_Method invocation inmeth)

VirtualDispatch_MultiHead: (VarPointsTo heap thisP) (CallGraphEdge invocation toMeth) (Reachable toMeth) <-
      (ReachableInstruction invocation),
      (VirtualMethodInvocation invocation base simplename descriptor),
      (VarPointsTo heap base),
      (HeapHelper simplename descriptor toMeth thisP heap)

VirtualDispatch_MultiHead: (VarPointsTo heap thisP) (CallGraphEdge invocation toMeth) (Reachable toMeth) <-
      (ReachableInstruction invocation),
      (VirtualMethodInvocation invocation base simplename descriptor),
      (VarPointsTo heap base),
      (HeapHelper simplename descriptor toMeth thisP heap)

Reachable_CGE_Virtual: (Reachable toMeth) (CallGraphEdge invocation toMeth) <-
      (ReachableInstruction invocation),
      (VirtualMethodInvocation invocation base simplename descriptor),
      (VarPointsTo heap base),
      (HeapHelperNoThis simplename descriptor toMeth heap)

Reachable_CGE_Virtual: (Reachable toMeth) (CallGraphEdge invocation toMeth) <-
      (ReachableInstruction invocation),
      (VirtualMethodInvocation invocation base simplename descriptor),
      (VarPointsTo heap base),
      (HeapHelperNoThis simplename descriptor toMeth heap)

SpecialDispatch_MultiHead: (VarPointsTo heap thisP) (CallGraphEdge invocation tometh) (Reachable tometh) <-
      (ReachableInstruction invocation),
      (SpecialMethodInvocation_Base invocation base),
      (VarPointsTo heap base),
      (MethodInvocation_Method invocation tometh),
      (ThisVar tometh thisP)

SpecialDispatch_MultiHead: (VarPointsTo heap thisP) (CallGraphEdge invocation tometh) (Reachable tometh) <-
      (ReachableInstruction invocation),
      (SpecialMethodInvocation_Base invocation base),
      (VarPointsTo heap base),
      (MethodInvocation_Method invocation tometh),
      (ThisVar tometh thisP)

IFPT_Store: (InstanceFieldPointsTo heap fld baseheap) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreInstanceField frm base fld inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base)

IFPT_Store: (InstanceFieldPointsTo heap fld baseheap) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreInstanceField frm base fld inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base)

IFPT_Store: (InstanceFieldPointsTo heap fld baseheap) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreInstanceField frm base fld inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base)

SFPT_Store: (StaticFieldPointsTo heap fld) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreStaticField frm fld inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

SFPT_Store: (StaticFieldPointsTo heap fld) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreStaticField frm fld inmeth),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

ReachableSortedIndex_rule: (ReachableSortedIndex frm base) <-
      (Reachable inmeth),
      (StoreArrayIndex frm base inmeth)

AIPT_Store_ObjectArray: (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap) <-
      (ReachableSortedIndex frm base),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (IsObjectArrayHeap baseheap),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

AIPT_Store_ObjectArray: (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap) <-
      (ReachableSortedIndex frm base),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (IsObjectArrayHeap baseheap),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

AIPT_Store_ObjectArray: (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap) <-
      (ReachableSortedIndex frm base),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (IsObjectArrayHeap baseheap),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm)

AIPT_Store: (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap) <-
      (ReachableSortedIndex frm base),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm),
      (HeapAllocSuperType heap baseheap)

AIPT_Store: (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap) <-
      (ReachableSortedIndex frm base),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm),
      (HeapAllocSuperType heap baseheap)

AIPT_Store: (ArrayIndexPointsTo baseheap heap) <-
      (ReachableSortedIndex frm base),
      (VarPointsTo baseheap base),
      (VarPointsTo heap frm),
      (HeapAllocSuperType heap baseheap)
